narrative_hint: Session 58 (ETL_USER) is the head blocker with CXPACKET waits. Sessions 71, 83, and 94 are all blocked by session 58 with LCK_M_S waits. The blocking_session_id column confirms session 58 is blocking all three APP_USER sessions. Claude should identify session 58 as the root cause and recommend investigating the ETL job's locking behavior and schedule.
